stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying at FL140 from overhead Airfield A to overhead Airfield B. The QNH at both airfields is 1013 hPa. Given the following information, calculate the approximate change in the true altitude whilst flying from Airfield A to Airfield B:

Airfield A
Elevation: 4000 ft
OAT: ISA -15°C

Airfield B
Elevation: 3000 ft
OAT: ISA +5°C
